series_metadata.series_description: Includes research data (e.g., data sets, programs, spreadsheets, surveys), internal research papers (e.g.,memoranda), and tertiary research sources (e.g., periodicals).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value to the Department, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value to the Department, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
